subject: runtime bridges (frida-objc-bridge, frida-swift-bridge, frida-java-bridge)
truth: Stop importing runtime bridges from Frida's GumJS runtime; they are no longer bundled and must be consumed separately via frida-tools 14.0.0 or frida-compile.

subject: legacy-style enumeration APIs (callback-object pattern)
new: Process.enumerateModulesSync() or the new async equivalent
truth: Stop using the legacy callback-object pattern for enumeration APIs (e.g. Process.enumerateModules({onMatch:..., onComplete:...})); use the Sync-suffixed or new async equivalent instead.

from_fact: process.enumeratemodulessync() or the new async equivalent

subject: Legacy-style enumeration APIs (callbacks-based)
truth: Stop using callback-based Process.enumerateModules(); use the modern version that returns an array of Module objects.
quote: These legacy-style APIs are now finally gone.

subject: Module.ensureInitialized()
truth: Stop using Module.ensureInitialized(); it has been removed.
quote: The following static Module methods are now gone: - Module.ensureInitialized()

subject: Module.findBaseAddress()
truth: Stop using Module.findBaseAddress(); use Process.getModuleByName('name').base instead.

subject: Module.getBaseAddress()
truth: Stop using Module.getBaseAddress(); use Process.getModuleByName('name').base instead.

subject: Module.findSymbolByName()
truth: Stop using Module.findSymbolByName(); it has been removed.

subject: Module.getSymbolByName(null, 'open')
truth: Stop using Module.getSymbolByName(null, 'open'); use Module.getGlobalExportByName('open') instead.
quote: Module.getSymbolByName(null, 'open') This is now accomplished like this: Module.getGlobalExportByName('open')

subject: Module.enumerateExports()
truth: Stop using Module.enumerateExports() static enumeration API; use Module.getExportByName() or equivalent per-module APIs instead.
quote: the static enumeration APIs, such as Module.enumerateExports(), are now also gone.

associative: get all exports of a module

subject: Debugger API
truth: Stop using Session.debugger API; use Script.debugger API instead.
quote: Move debugger API from Session to Script.

subject: USBMUXD_SERVER_* environment variables
truth: Stop using USBMUXD_SERVER_* environment variables; they are no longer supported.
quote: fruity: Drop support for USBMUXD_SERVER_* envvars.

subject: Python package distribution format
truth: Stop using Python eggs for frida; use wheels instead.
quote: python: Build Python wheels instead of eggs. Thanks @oriori1703!

subject: Memory.read* and Memory.write* static functions
truth: Stop using Memory.readU32(), Memory.writeU32() and similar static Memory read/write functions; use NativePointer instance methods like ptr().readU32() and ptr().writeU32() instead.
quote: The legacy versions of these are now also gone

subject: Python bindings
truth: Stop using Python 2 with frida; Python 3 is now required.
quote: python: Drop Python 2 support, modernize code, add docstrings, typings, add CI with modern tooling, and many other goodies. Thanks @yotamN!
